email-mcp.description: Email integration via Gmail MCP. Send, draft, search, and manage emails.

gmail-watcher.description: Monitor Gmail for new important emails and create action files.

whatsapp-watcher.description: Monitor WhatsApp Web for messages with keywords like urgent, invoice, payment.

linkedin-poster.description: Automatically post updates to LinkedIn for business promotion.

planner.description: Create Plan.md files for multi-step tasks with Qwen Code reasoning.

approval-workflow.description: Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) approval workflow for sensitive actions.

scheduler.description: Schedule recurring tasks via cron or Task Scheduler.
